projectDescription: A full-stack PHP/MySQL website for Sentidos Café in Cusco, Peru — featuring an interactive menu, online reservations, WhatsApp ordering, and an admin panel for managing orders and users.
keyFeatures: Interactive café menu with combo ordering via WhatsApp
Table reservation system with date/time and party size
User registration form with AJAX and MySQL persistence
Google Maps integration showing café location in Cusco
Floating and inline WhatsApp chat buttons for instant contact
Payroll/tax calculator tool for staff management
Accordion gallery for featured food combos
Responsive design optimized for mobile and desktop
publicApiSurface: guardar_usuario.php — AJAX endpoint to save user registrations
script.sql — Database schema: pedidos, reservas, usuarios tables
